nasb.text: To the families of the sons of Merari, the rest of the Levites, they gave from the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam with its pasture lands and Kartah with its pasture lands.

esv.text: And to the rest of the Levites, the Merarite clans, were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam with its pasturelands, Kartah with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 其餘的利未人，米拉利的子孫的家族，從西布倫支派中分得約念和約念的郊野，加珥他和加珥他的郊野，

ccb.text: 其余的利未人，就是米拉利的子孙所分到的城邑有：西布伦支派的约念、加珥他、
